ddls:
CREATE TABLE "subject_matter_experts" (
  "subject_matter_expert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject matter expert */,
  "expert_name" TEXT /* Full name of the subject matter expert */,
  "expert_bio" TEXT /* Biographical description of the subject matter expert */,
  "expert_area_of_expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the subject matter expert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_matter_expert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "course_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course */,
  "course_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course */,
  "subject_matter_expert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the subject matter expert associated with the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_subject_matter_expert_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_matter_expert_id") REFERENCES subject_matter_experts ("subject_matter_expert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "email_address" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "student_enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was submitted */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the student providing feedback */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the course for which feedback is being provided */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date associated with the feedback (could be course date or submission date) */,
  "content_level" TEXT /* Student's rating of the level of content */,
  "appropriateness" TEXT /* Student's rating of the appropriateness of the content */,
  "applicability" TEXT /* Student's rating of the applicability of the content */,
  "coverage_level" TEXT /* Student's rating of the level of coverage */,
  "weekly_objectives_achievement" TEXT /* Student's rating of the achievement of weekly learning objectives */,
  "subject_mastery_exhibit" TEXT /* Student's rating of the SME's ability to exhibit knowledge of the subject matter */,
  "subject_mastery_current_developments" TEXT /* Student's rating of the SME's ability to inject current developments relevant to the topic */,
  "subject_mastery_practical_applications" TEXT /* Student's rating of the SME's ability to balance principles/theories with practical applications */,
  "speaker_preparedness" TEXT /* Student's rating of the preparedness of the speaker */,
  "speaker_material_organization" TEXT /* Student's rating of the speaker's ability to organize materials for clarity and precision */,
  "speaker_interest_arousal" TEXT /* Student's rating of the speaker's ability to arouse interest */,
  "speaker_acceptability" TEXT /* Student's rating of the acceptability of the SME as a resource person */,
  "speaker_effectiveness" TEXT /* General effectiveness of the speaker and reasons */,
  "speaker_best_aspect" TEXT /* The best thing the student can say about the SME */,
  "speaker_improvement_suggestions" TEXT /* Suggestions for improvement for the SME */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the feedback being responded to */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response to the feedback by the SME */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date of response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_responses_feedback_id FOREIGN KEY ("feedback_id") REFERENCES feedback ("feedback_id")
)
